Package tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker

Class AbstractDockerAction

  • java.lang.Object
    • tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.AbstractDockerAction
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IAdaptationAction
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ExecCommandAction, KillContainerAction, PauseContainerAction, RemoveContainerAction, RestartContainerAction, ScaleInAction, ScaleOutAction, StartContainerAction, StopContainerAction, UnpauseContainerAction, UpdateResourcesAction
    public abstract class AbstractDockerAction
extends Object
implements IAdaptationAction
    Abstract base class for Docker-based adaptation actions.

    This class provides common functionality for interacting with Docker containers including client initialization, container lookup, and state management.

    Author:
    Arléon Zemtsop (Cerberus)

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      boolean canPerform()
      Checks if this action can be performed given the current system state.
      protected static com.github.dockerjava.api.DockerClient createDefaultDockerClient()
      Creates the default Docker client configured to connect to the local Docker daemon.
      protected static com.github.dockerjava.api.DockerClient createDockerClient​(String dockerHost)
      Creates a Docker client configured to connect to the specified Docker host.
      protected com.github.dockerjava.api.model.Container findContainer​(String containerIdOrName)
      Finds a container by its ID or name.
      String getActionId()
      Returns the unique identifier of this adaptation action.
      DockerActionType getActionType()
      Returns the Docker action type.
      String getContainerId()
      Returns the target container ID.
      String getDescription()
      Returns a human-readable description of this adaptation action.
      int getTimeoutSeconds()
      Returns the timeout in seconds for this action.
      protected boolean isContainerPaused​(String containerIdOrName)
      Checks if a container is in a paused state.
      protected boolean isContainerRunning​(String containerIdOrName)
      Checks if a container is in a running state.
      protected boolean isContainerStopped​(String containerIdOrName)
      Checks if a container is in a stopped/exited state.
      protected void logActionFailure​(Exception e)
      Logs an action failure.
      protected void logActionStart()
      Logs the start of an action execution.
      protected void logActionSuccess()
      Logs the successful completion of an action.
      AdaptationActionResult rollback()
      Rolls back the adaptation action if possible.
      boolean supportsRollback()
      Checks if this action supports rollback.

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractDockerAction

        protected AbstractDockerAction​(String containerId,
                               DockerActionType actionType)
        Constructs a new AbstractDockerAction with the specified container ID and action type.
        Parameters:
        containerId - the ID or name of the target container
        actionType - the type of Docker action to perform

      • AbstractDockerAction

        protected AbstractDockerAction​(String containerId,
                               DockerActionType actionType,
                               int timeoutSeconds)
        Constructs a new AbstractDockerAction with the specified parameters.
        Parameters:
        containerId - the ID or name of the target container
        actionType - the type of Docker action to perform
        timeoutSeconds - the timeout in seconds for the action

      • AbstractDockerAction

        protected AbstractDockerAction​(String containerId,
                               DockerActionType actionType,
                               int timeoutSeconds,
                               com.github.dockerjava.api.DockerClient dockerClient)
        Constructs a new AbstractDockerAction with a custom Docker client.
        Parameters:
        containerId - the ID or name of the target container
        actionType - the type of Docker action to perform
        timeoutSeconds - the timeout in seconds for the action
        dockerClient - the Docker client to use

      • createDefaultDockerClient

        protected static com.github.dockerjava.api.DockerClient createDefaultDockerClient()

        a configured DockerClient instance

        protected static com.github.dockerjava.api.DockerClient createDockerClient​(String dockerHost)
        Creates a Docker client configured to connect to the specified Docker host.
        Parameters:
        dockerHost - the Docker host URI
        Returns:
        a configured DockerClient instance

      • supportsRollback

        public boolean supportsRollback()
        Description copied from interface: IAdaptationAction
        Checks if this action supports rollback.
        Specified by:
        supportsRollback in interface IAdaptationAction
        Returns:
        true if rollback is supported, false otherwise

      • rollback

        public AdaptationActionResult rollback()
        Description copied from interface: IAdaptationAction
        Rolls back the adaptation action if possible.

        This method attempts to revert the changes made by the perform method. Not all actions support rollback.

        Specified by:
        rollback in interface IAdaptationAction
        Returns:
        the result of the rollback operation

      • findContainer

        protected com.github.dockerjava.api.model.Container findContainer​(String containerIdOrName)
        Finds a container by its ID or name.
        Parameters:
        containerIdOrName - the container ID or name to search for
        Returns:
        the Container object if found
        Throws:
        DockerActionException - if the container is not found

        protected boolean isContainerRunning​(String containerIdOrName)
        Checks if a container is in a running state.

        Returns:
        true if the container is running

        protected boolean isContainerStopped​(String containerIdOrName)
